title: A look inside 2015 The Last Year of Ryohji Kaji
display_title: A look inside 2015 The Last Year of Ryohji Kaji
wikitext:
[]: A look inside 2015//The Last Year of Ryohji Kaji             Quote Post by soupy » Sun Aug 22, 2004 12:45 am Enjoy, Ill put in more English quotes out of the book daily, just too much to type if I did it all at once :shock: . Here's some pics. Picked up the book from mandarake for around 2800yen I think. Shipping killed me :x. Sorry, no scans, don't want to ruin the binding. [url]http://soupy-chan.com/2015kaji1.jpg[/url] [url]http://soupy-chan.com/2015kaji2.jpg[/url] [url]http://soupy-chan.com/2015kaji3.jpg[/url] [url]http://soupy-chan.com/2015kaji4.jpg[/url] [url]http://soupy-chan.com/2015kaji5.jpg[/url] [url]http://soupy-chan.com/2015kaji6.jpg[/url] [url]http://soupy-chan.com/2015kaji7.jpg[/url] [url]http://soupy-chan.com/2015kaji8.jpg[/url] [url]http://soupy-chan.com/2015kaji9.jpg[/url] [url]http://soupy-chan.com/2015kaji10.jpg[/url] [url]http://soupy-chan.com/2015kaji11.jpg[/url] [url]http://soupy-chan.com/2015kaji12.jpg[/url] [url]http://soupy-chan.com/2015kaji13.jpg[/url] [url]http://soupy-chan.com/2015kaji14.jpg[/url] "We can be a trio again like we used to be." "Undercover military bases are usually made underground. Am I wrong? At least in TV animations I used to watch. And so they dug here. "undercover" doesn't fit the sunlight. And then? Which one do you want to know? The outline of the Operation of Replenishing Mankind? Or the truth of Second Impact? Or the aim of the ANGEL? Or the relationship ADAM and LILITH and EVA? Or the identity of the men called the committee? Or that of what we call "the spear"? Or the aim of Commander Ikari. Or. Or. Or. Or. OK, that's enough. Cut it out. You must have got it. As long as you have a secret, a question will chase it. You'd better take what you see for the truth. Am I wrong? Well, ..... , Now it is my turn. What is the door for, opening or closing? What do you think? Don't look at me like that. This is very important for me. Especially in here, the deepest underground, there are so many doors. Well, well, well. What do you think? If you'd like to say, "I don't know" How about this instead? "The door should be opened by force." That's the reason. That's why I am here." -The conversation with Kaji through a certain channel. Blue is the color of nerves Purple is hte color of the priest costume Red is the color of arteries Dang, Dang, Dang The colors come into my sight The illumination of a gunfight Grey is the color of bombing Taste of rust spreading in my mouth Feeling rigid rocks beneath my feet Dang, Dang, Dang Drumming of priminitive ages Rhythem of insanity Dance of the giants Holding guns of madness Dang, Dang, Dang When humans were not humans When they were neighbors of beasts Memories were carved in their brain With a knife of fury Dang, Dang, Dang The arms Dang, Dang, Dang The legs Dang, Dang, Dang The eyes Dancing giants: colored in blue, purple and red This is the village of the giants There live the Gods expelled from Heaven's seats Stilll is the sun shining above their heads -from a note of Ryohji Kaji

[]:             Quote Post by soupy » Sun Aug 22, 2004 12:57 am "EVA-00 Prototype. It is produced as a experimental model, the first Evangelion The operator, Rei Ayanami, out of control right after starting and temporarily suspended. After suspension back to the battle field and terribly damaged. Afterward fixed the equipment and color coasting, back again. EVA-01 Test Type, The model produced with acutal fighting in view The operator, Shinji Ikari Sent to the gbattle field immediately without testing Even though a great deal of damage and got out of control Succeed in destroying the enemy EVA-02 The first production model. The operators; Soryu, Asuka, Langley The model assembled in Germany There are some peculiarities to be mentioned about EVA-01 It made unbelievable results in actual fighting Besides Commander Ikari's attachment and persistence This model seems to be primarily protected But it has been sent to fight so many times Their intention unindentified There is a possibility that they let it go out of control intentionally We have to be careful about Exchanging Experiment between these EVAs Some doubts abouot choosing the operators Keep an eye on MALDWICK's AGENCY P.S. Check again the record of the accident of Gendou Ikari's wife, Yui" -Ryohji Kaji's note- "One boy I'll tell you a few things about him This boy is always looking for something He seems so at least to me He stops once in a while He hesitates He meditates He never wants anything He just stops without reason The boy asks me something As if he wanted to be saved As if he was trying to get relieved Watermelons grow with water and the sunlight Watermelon the only thing he got But no humans grow With only water and the sunlight What else has to follow? A Language supports, and opponents A longely boy has nothing SO he is asking for them But He is a boy to whom two unfortunate things belong He has no way of asking I have no way of teaching Therefore I can do nothing but water the watermelons In front of his knees The watermelon This is the only thing I can choose I kno it is meaningless The boy will find the way with his mind reckless I strongly believe so" -Voice data left by Ryohji Kaji- You see ruins everywhere Shell mounds of anceint days The palace fallen into decay The streets buried under clay Gorgeous and enormous tumulus in the desert To call the scar of human life a ruin This place will be called so TOKYO-3 What will be left? Future generations wiill find a titanium complex huge gun stuck into the ground? Will they know this is the sign of the giant fighters Is it a complete misunderstanding? No It might be correct This city belongs to the giants Humans are subject to them? The relationship of master and servant is easily converted The truth fades earlier than the ruins In hundreds, thousands, and millions of years An obscure mass is going to break into pieces Future generations can't do anything but guess Only if they survive till then You see ruins everywhere Maybe all over the world sometime later -An extract from Ryohji Kaji's note- How long have I been away from writing a letter? I haven't seen my own handwriting for ages. It is so difficult like trying to pick up something fragile on a swinging boat. I don't know where I sould begin. Am I afraid to start to writing? I'm just rying to write to forget what I've seen. So I've made up my mind to write down only scraps of my own memory. EVA. These three letters from the word of the beginning. Perhaps it, I can tell now, might be the word of the ending. ADAM. That' a fragment of the truth. Tiny silver square box in my hand. It's so light as to hold easily with one hand. It is the weight of the truth. And it is the cost of my life spent there for several years. The boat swings again. The words swing away. With EVA and ADAM. I've never expected to see you again, might have expected that it had finished by then. No! here is the beginning of the end. I'm telling a lie even to myself. Dancing letters decorated with lies. If this letter were worth reading, the lies would be worth telling. It is so difficult like trying to get something fragile on a swinging boat. A liar can be a liar when he keeps his lie to his grave. So I decided to tell you a lie. I put this letter in the bottom of the baggage. Because no postman will come to pick it up. -Ryohji Kaji, an extract from an anonymous letter not posted How many letters have I wrriten like this? I got used to writing letters to nobody Do I just want to leave something The proof that I lived my life here What am I to think like this? Ridiculous! This will be the last one I always have a feeling of sinking down I am in the swamp impossible to get out of Who is dragging me down from the bottom No, nobody is dragging It is me who decide to step into the swamp The truth I've seen can be worthy of my life? Have I satisfied my soul? Just a curiousity at the beginning Not a sense of mission at all But now I want to tell you the truth I kno this letter won't be sent to you because I will never post it Despite of it. I have tried to inform you Do I want you to remember my existence? Leave off talking to myself It is meaningless I'm just trying to take responsiblity I have to leave here now I'll never write again -A never posted letter by Ryohji Kaji- Seeing the scars of the battle I almost feel dizzy This is not only because of the burning sun They say this town was made as a field only for the battle So many skyscrapers And everybody knows that Each one of them is a spear and at the same time a shield Far back in the past, man was trying to be God And built a tower high enough to reach the sky It however, was broken down by the God The Apostles Those who have the names of angels They are the fathful servants sent by the God Human beings Poor creatures Why do they have to revel against God to satisfy their greed The scars of the battle A kind of dizziness, more like despair I'm sure despair and death are waiting in the future The human soul will never sing a song of the revival -Untitled(handwriting on a piece of paper)- <Evangelion> The Duplications of ADAM and LILITH. Because they have no 'soul' to control themselves. Therefore, it is essential for them to have 'operator' as their soul. The operators exchangeable only between EVA-00 and EVA-01. The reason unidentified. <ANGEL> THe living objects given the same genes pattern of humans'. Their aim seems to contact with 'ADAM'. It is thought that they share the same mind. Their forms and acting formations, however, have a great variety. <AT Field> "The Absolute terror Field" owned only by ANGEL and EVANGELION. Sense only "maleficent contacts" and shut them out. Only the same kind of Field can neutralize it. It might be a barrier formed by self-defense instinct. <The Operation of Replenishing Mankind> Some doubts about Commander Ikari's behavior. Too many conflicts with the "Replenshment Committee" That suggests the existence of two "The Operation of Replenishing" THe details not clear clear yet. Commander Ikari suspected to have the connection with ADAM in underground. <The Replenishment Committee> The chief of this committee is a man called KEEL. Confirmed the existence of the organization called "SEELE" behind it The actual situation is under investigation. Connected to "the secret version of Dead Sea Scroll" <The Schedule> Re-investigate the relation between "Gendou Ikari and SEELE" Sneak into "Terminal Dogma" Try again to obtain "the Secret Data" -An extract from the Report by Kaji-

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Sun Aug 22, 2004 11:59 am :shock: woah...woah. I want a copy! Soupy, thanks so much for these pics and quotes. Awsome. :shock: woah.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sun Aug 22, 2004 12:00 pm *drool...*

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sun Aug 22, 2004 4:08 pm love the gun the the field...gives a real sense of perspective... really cool...about 28 US$?

[]:             Quote Post by ShoKenju » Sun Aug 22, 2004 4:13 pm .....i cried...... :shock: :shock: :shock: :shock: :shock: :shock: .....i covet..... :cry: :cry: :cry: :cry: :cry: :cry: :cry: :cry: .....i pillage..... :twisted: :twisted: :twisted: :twisted: :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by kosure » Sun Aug 22, 2004 4:26 pm just how much was shipping?

[]:             Quote Post by soupy » Sun Aug 22, 2004 7:24 pm just how much was shipping?

[]:             Quote Post by kosure » Sun Aug 22, 2004 7:54 pm thats it. I'm buying a copy. shipping charged be damned.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Aug 22, 2004 9:25 pm Umm this may be just a dub question but can you get this thing totaly in english?

[]:             Quote Post by soupy » Sun Aug 22, 2004 10:13 pm nope! This was a limited edition book with only 2015 copies released on its first printing in Japan. It's mixed with english and Japanese letters/voice recordings/poems/etc. by Kaji. Only EVA book I think that's available in english currently (other than the manga) is Sadamoto's art book, Der Mond.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 22, 2004 11:24 pm The only Eva books adapted into English is the manga and Der Mond. 2015 is a unique case, because it is 100% bilingual. Which is probably the coolest thing about it. Its quite a lavish book. Quite rare though. An excellent collector's item.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Aug 23, 2004 12:21 am what is in it again? Kaji's poems and thoughts? sounds really kool...just dont know where to get it...

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Mon Aug 23, 2004 12:32 am I hope that the information in that book is usefull, because they didn't even bother of doing some nice artwork, they just put some crappy evangelion action figures photographs. :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by kosure » Mon Aug 23, 2004 7:19 am sadsadshinji wrote: kool...just dont know where to get it...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Aug 23, 2004 3:35 pm I guess I purchased the last one last night. ;;

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Mon Aug 23, 2004 4:01 pm CURSE YOU EVAMONKEY! CURSE YOUUuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu...............

[]: Woah...             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Mon Aug 23, 2004 4:10 pm That is amazing! Thanks for putting it up, it's the next best thing to driving over to Evamonkey's how in the dark of night and stealing his copy!

[]: Re: Woah...             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Mon Aug 23, 2004 4:18 pm Olin of Xephon wrote: it's the next best thing to driving over to Evamonkey's how in the dark of night and stealing his copy!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Aug 23, 2004 9:36 pm But how will I have glorious contests and competitions pitting one against the other for my own personal amusement?

. The reason unidentified. <ANGEL> THe living objects given the same genes pattern of humans'. Their aim seems to contact with 'ADAM'. It is thought that they share the same mind.
